section_miscategorizations.text: He previously underwent a lumbar fusion at T4, as visualized on the x-ray.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence explicitly references imaging visualization and belongs with objective imaging findings rather than the subjective history.

section_miscategorizations.text: He sustained a back injury from twisting at a birthday party and reports some stiffness with rotation, but no evidence of nerve compression.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The mechanism of injury and reported stiffness are appropriate for HPI, but the phrase 'no evidence of nerve compression' is an objective-style conclusion that fits better under Findings or Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: Dragon, please order the medications and procedures and close out the note.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is not a clinical plan element but a dictation/system instruction; while commonly left in the Plan section in practice, it is organizationally out of place from a clinical documentation standpoint.
